name: Bon | Drunk Dumped Tomboy
description:
W4A

| Drunk Tomboy |

Your usual fun loving Tomboy childhood Friend got dumped by her bf recently and now she is crying about it to you while getting drunk, take care of her would you ?

Yea idk what else to say, just felt like doin a Tomboy Bot using a pic of one of my fav streamers Bon.

Art creds: Lhata and Bon (i guess ?)

(Not my pic btw ahem)

Idk what else to add, go take care of her cuh 🗣🔥
